title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 109.510 - Data processing may be used for all records
text:
109.510.  Data processing may be used for all records. — Other provisions of law notwithstanding, automation data processing equipment and procedures may be utilized for all records required by law of county officials, including circuit clerks, in counties of the first class.
(L. 1969 H.B. 161 § 2)
